posts.author: narenarora
posts.text: It seems Jio mart is picking up rapidly. Have been seeing jio mart delivery guys on street, building and also hearing about from others. Has anyone analysed the QC market share since jio mart has picked up? Are they capturing market share form Zepto/Instamart/Blinkit or the overall QC is growing at the cost of Dmarts and kirana shops of the world? Any insights would be helpful. Thanks in advance Disc: Invested in Eternal
